tasks.label: Full Build Pipeline
tasks.command: node scripts/validate-primitives.js && node scripts/generate-marketplace.js && node scripts/generate-website-data.js && node scripts/update-readme.js

tasks.label: Ecosystem Scorecard
tasks.command: node -e "const a=require('fs').readdirSync('agents').filter(f=>f.endsWith('.agent.md')).length;const i=require('fs').readdirSync('instructions').filter(f=>f.endsWith('.instructions.md')).length;const s=require('fs').readdirSync('skills').filter(f=>require('fs').statSync('skills/'+f).isDirectory()).length;const h=require('fs').readdirSync('hooks').filter(f=>require('fs').statSync('hooks/'+f).isDirectory()).length;const p=require('fs').readdirSync('plugins').filter(f=>require('fs').statSync('plugins/'+f).isDirectory()).length;const w=require('fs').readdirSync('workflows').filter(f=>f.endsWith('.md')&&f!=='README.md').length;const c=require('fs').readdirSync('cookbook').filter(f=>f.endsWith('.md')&&f!=='README.md').length;console.log('\n  FrootAI Ecosystem Scorecard');console.log('  '+'-'.repeat(35));console.log('  Agents:       '+a+' (vs 187)');console.log('  Instructions: '+i+' (vs 175)');console.log('  Skills:       '+s+' (vs 271)');console.log('  Hooks:        '+h+' (vs 6)');console.log('  Plugins:      '+p+' (vs 65)');console.log('  Workflows:    '+w+' (vs 7)');console.log('  Cookbook:      '+c+' (vs 7)');console.log('  '+'-'.repeat(35)+'\n');"
